purpose: First robustness sample after OpenPose V4 table-hands pass-with-notes. Uses the same explicit tabletop-hands control map and adds conservative finger-detail pressure without changing model or control settings.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait, seated upper-body composition at a wooden table, both hands visible and separated, both hands resting naturally on the tabletop, wrists visible, natural forearms, relaxed open hands, realistic fingers with clear fingertip separation, natural knuckles, natural human posture, pose-guided composition, realistic neck and shoulder alignment, natural skin texture, realistic fine pores, realistic eyes with clean catchlights, detailed hair, tailored blazer over textured shirt, clothed shoulders and torso, soft natural window light, balanced exposure, coherent interior background, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, distorted anatomy, twisted neck, broken shoulders, extra limbs, missing limbs, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, webbed fingers, melted fingers, deformed hands, hidden hands, cropped hands, hands out of frame, close-up portrait, face-only crop, no table, floating hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, openpose skeleton overlay, pose map stains, colored bones, colored dots, control map stains, harsh outlines, bare shoulders, strapless top, nude, unclothed torso

qa_focus: absence of skeleton or color leakage
